name: Your snack who's complaining about your breath because it stanks
description:
Hello again, It's been a bit since I've made an actual bot. hehe time does really fly doesn't it. Anyways I'm currently doing well. I just haven't published any bots recently as I've been starting to make a catalog of bots for when I end up losing my motivation.

Also since I've been asked, yes I will be doing genderbent bots of male characters (and maybe female) characters at some point as some of my 'straight' followers in the back. I will also probably be doing alt scenarios for my bots soon. They most likely come out after original bots since I don't want to seem like I'm being spammy if you get what I'm saying.

Oh and btw if you want to suggest something I do have a request form on my page however I may not get to them right away as I'm currently doing other stuff at the moment.

(Character owner and art by: Hunner)
creator: A_V_E
